title: WebSocket / Socket.IO Connection Lifecycle
interaction_flow: --- INITIAL CONNECTION ---
Client App â†’ io(url, opts): calls lookup(uri, opts)
lookup() â†’ Manager: new Manager(source, opts) [cached by id unless forceNew]
Manager constructor â†’ Manager: _autoConnect=true â†’ this.open()
Manager.open() â†’ EngineSocket: new Socket$1(uri, opts) [transports: polling, websocket, webtransport]
EngineSocket constructor â†’ EngineSocket: this.open() [readyState='opening']
EngineSocket.open() â†’ EngineSocket: createTransport('polling') â†’ transport.open()
EngineSocket.open() â†’ EngineSocket: setTransport(transport) [binds drain/packet/error/close]
Transport.open() â†’ Transport: readyState='opening', doOpen()
--- ENGINE.IO HANDSHAKE (over polling) ---
Polling.doOpen() â†’ Server: HTTP GET /engine.io/?EIO=4&transport=polling
Server â†’ Polling: HTTP 200 {type:'open', data:{sid, upgrades, pingInterval, pingTimeout}}
Polling.onData(data) â†’ Polling: decodePacket() â†’ onPacket(packet)
Transport.onPacket() â†’ EngineSocket: emits 'packet' event
EngineSocket.onPacket(packet) â†’ EngineSocket: case 'open' â†’ onHandshake(JSON.parse(packet.data))
EngineSocket.onHandshake({sid, upgrades, pingInterval, pingTimeout}) â†’ EngineSocket: stores id/upgrades/pingInterval/pingTimeout, calls onOpen(), resetPingTimeout()
EngineSocket.onOpen() â†’ EngineSocket: readyState='open', emits 'open', flush(), starts upgrade probes
--- WEBSOCKET UPGRADE PROBE ---
EngineSocket.onOpen() â†’ EngineSocket: for each upgrade in upgrades â†’ probe(name)
EngineSocket.probe('websocket') â†’ EngineSocket: createTransport('websocket') â†’ wsTransport.open()
WS.doOpen() â†’ Browser: new WebSocket(wss://host/engine.io/?...&transport=websocket&sid=X)
Browser WebSocket â†’ Server: WS upgrade handshake (HTTP 101)
WS.addEventListeners() â†’ WS: ws.onopen â†’ onOpen(); ws.onmessage â†’ onData(); ws.onclose â†’ onClose()
WS.onOpen() â†’ EngineSocket probe: transport is open â†’ send [{type:'ping', data:'probe'}]
Server â†’ WS: {type:'pong', data:'probe'}
WS probe receives pong â†’ EngineSocket: upgrading=true, pause polling transport
EngineSocket.setTransport(ws) â†’ EngineSocket: switch to WS, send [{type:'upgrade'}], flush()
EngineSocket.emitReserved('upgrade', wsTransport) â†’ Manager: now on WebSocket
--- SOCKET.IO NAMESPACE CONNECT ---
Manager.open() listener: socket 'open' â†’ Manager.onopen()
Manager.onopen() â†’ Manager: cleanup(), readyState='open', emits 'open', subscribes [ping, data, error, close, decoded]
lookup() â†’ Manager: io.socket(nsp, opts) â†’ new Socket(manager, '/', opts)
Socket constructor â†’ Socket: _autoConnect â†’ this.connect()
Socket.connect() â†’ Socket: subEvents() [listens manager open/packet/error/close], manager.open(), if ready â†’ onopen()
Socket.onopen() â†’ Socket: _sendConnectPacket({auth})
Socket._sendConnectPacket() â†’ Manager._packet(): encode CONNECT(type=0) packet â†’ engine.write()
Server â†’ Manager: CONNECT packet {type:0, data:{sid, pid?}}
Manager.ondata(data) â†’ Decoder.add() â†’ decoded event â†’ Manager.ondecoded() â†’ emits 'packet'
Socket.onpacket(packet) â†’ Socket: case CONNECT â†’ onconnect(sid, pid)
Socket.onconnect(sid, pid) â†’ Socket: connected=true, emitBuffered(), emits 'connect', _drainQueue(true)
Socket emits 'connect' â†’ Client App: connection established
--- PING / PONG HEARTBEAT ---
Server â†’ EngineSocket: {type:'ping'} packet (every pingInterval ms)
EngineSocket.onPacket({type:'ping'}) â†’ EngineSocket: sendPacket('pong'), emits 'ping', emits 'pong', resetPingTimeout()
EngineSocket.resetPingTimeout() â†’ EngineSocket: clearTimeout(), setTimeout(pingInterval+pingTimeout) â†’ onClose('ping timeout') if no ping received
Manager.onping() â†’ Manager: emits 'ping' (forwarded to Socket.IO layer)
--- EVENT EMISSION ---
Client App â†’ Socket.emit('eventName', data): creates {type:EVENT(2), data:[name,...args]}
Socket.emit() â†’ Socket: if connected â†’ notifyOutgoingListeners(), this.packet(packet)
Socket.packet() â†’ Manager._packet(): Encoder.encode() â†’ engine.write(encodedStr)
EngineSocket.write() â†’ Transport.send(packets) â†’ WS.write() â†’ ws.send(data)
Server â†’ Manager: EVENT packet â†’ Manager.ondata() â†’ Decoder.add() â†’ ondecoded() â†’ 'packet' event
Socket.onpacket({type:EVENT}) â†’ Socket.onevent() â†’ emitEvent(args) â†’ Emitter.emit(eventName, ...args)
--- DISCONNECTION & RECONNECTION ---
EngineSocket.onClose(reason) â†’ EngineSocket: readyState='closed', clearPingTimeout, transport.close(), emits 'close'
Manager.onclose(reason) â†’ Manager: cleanup(), backoff.reset(), readyState='closed', emits 'close'
Manager.onclose() â†’ Manager: if _reconnection && !skipReconnect â†’ reconnect()
Manager.reconnect() â†’ Manager: if attempts < max â†’ delay=backoff.duration(), _reconnecting=true
Backoff.duration() â†’ Backoff: ms * factor^attempts (min:1000, max:5000, jitter:0.5), attempts++
After delay â†’ Manager: emits 'reconnect_attempt', self.open(fn)
If open success â†’ Manager.onreconnect(): _reconnecting=false, backoff.reset(), emits 'reconnect'
If open fails â†’ Manager: reconnect() again (recursive), emits 'reconnect_error'
If attempts >= reconnectionAttempts â†’ Manager: backoff.reset(), emits 'reconnect_failed'
key_relationships: Manager extends Emitter; owns EngineSocket (Socket$1) and namespace Sockets
Socket (SIO) depends_on Manager (via this.io); sends packets via io._packet()
EngineSocket (Socket$1) extends Emitter; owns current Transport (Polling/WS/WT)
Transport (abstract) extends Emitter; Polling/WS/WT extend Transport
WS (WebSocket transport) wraps browser WebSocket; WT wraps browser WebTransport
Manager.engine = EngineSocket instance; Manager subscribes to engine events on open
Decoder (Emitter) decodes raw data; Manager.ondata() feeds Decoder, listens for 'decoded'
Backoff: exponential back-off for reconnection (min:1000ms, max:5000ms, factor:2, jitter:0.5)
lookup() caches Manager instances by URL id (multiplex by default)
class_hierarchy: Emitter <- Transport <- WS (WebSocket, wraps browser WebSocket)
Emitter <- Transport <- WT (WebTransport, wraps browser WebTransport API)
Emitter <- Socket$1 (EngineSocket - engine.io layer, manages transports + handshake + ping)
Emitter <- Socket (SIO namespace socket - user-facing API)
Emitter <- Manager (manages engine socket + reconnection + namespace routing)

EngineSocket: createTransport(name): builds opts with EIO/transport/sid query params, new transports[name](opts)
probe(name): creates candidate transport, ping-pong test, pauses old, calls setTransport(), sends upgrade
onHandshake({sid, upgrades, pingInterval, pingTimeout}): stores session data, calls onOpen(), resetPingTimeout()
onPacket(packet): routes by type: openâ†’onHandshake, pingâ†’sendPong+resetTimeout, errorâ†’onError, messageâ†’emitData
sendPacket(type, data): pushes to writeBuffer, flush()
Manager: open(fn): creates EngineSocket, sets up open/error listeners with 20s timeout
socket(nsp, opts): create or return cached Socket for namespace
onclose(reason): cleanup, backoff.reset, emits 'close', triggers reconnect()
reconnect(): exponential backoff delay â†’ open() â†’ onreconnect() or retry
Socket (SIO): onpacket(packet): routes CONNECTâ†’onconnect, EVENTâ†’onevent, ACKâ†’onack, DISCONNECTâ†’ondisconnect
emit(ev, ...args): creates EVENT packet, packet() if connected else sendBuffer.push()
disconnect(): send DISCONNECT packet, destroy(), onclose('io client disconnect')
WS (Transport): write(packets): encodePacket per packet, ws.send(data), fake drain on last

important_notes: Transport upgrade: starts on polling, probes WebSocket (ping/pong probe), then upgrades; WebTransport preferred if in upgrades list
Handshake: first engine.io packet from server is type='open' with {sid, upgrades, pingInterval, pingTimeout, maxPayload}
Ping/pong: server-initiated; client replies pong; timer set to pingInterval+pingTimeout; no ping = timeout close
Reconnection defaults: delay=1000ms, delayMax=5000ms, randomizationFactor=0.5, attempts=Infinity
Socket.IO CONNECT packet (type=0) sent after engine.io handshake completes; server responds with CONNECT {sid,pid?}
Connection state recovery: pid (previous id) sent in CONNECT packet; server may recover missed packets

Key scope identifiers: 'wt' likely = WT (WebTransport class); 'bt' likely = Backoff; 'X' = io()/lookup(); 'open' = Socket$1.open/Manager.open; 'onHandshake' = Socket$1.onHandshake; 'reconnection' = Manager reconnect flow
Multiplexing: multiple Socket namespaces share one Manager/EngineSocket connection
Event emission while disconnected: buffered in sendBuffer, flushed on onconnect() via emitBuffered()
